description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a symmetrical facade and a prominent central entryway. The exterior features a dark, hipped roof with a small chimney and multiple rectangular windows arranged in even rows across all sides. The front includes a double garage on the left, a main entrance with glass double doors, and a series of tall windows above and beside the entry. The house sits on a rectangular green lawn, with paved paths leading to the entry and garage. The rear and sides of the house have additional windows, with the back showing a continuous row of windows on the ground floor. The overall design is stately and balanced, with a focus on regularity and classic suburban residential style.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a dark hipped roof, symmetrical window rows, and a central entryway with a double garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brick facade and evenly spaced windows, with no visible garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long row of windows on the ground floor and a simple brick exterior.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional windows and a secondary door, maintaining the symmetrical design.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double glass doors with sidelights, no porch, and a paved path leading to the entry.
